title: Opening for Software Engineer at mfine

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at mfine
jsonLd.description:
mfine invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About mfine:
mfine is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine!
